Period: The time period for which the customer service team size and capacity utilization rate are reported.
Team Size: The number of full-time representatives in the customer service team during the reported period.
Capacity Utilization Rate: The percentage of the customer service team's capacity that is currently being utilized. This can indicate if the team is understaffed or overstaffed.
Available Capacity: The percentage of the customer service team's capacity that is not currently utilized and available for handling volume spikes.
